welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.text: Start tracking your progress — enter today's character count!
welcome.intro: Enter the number of characters you've written to start tracking your progress. The more data, the more accurate the advice and forecasts.

fewData.title: Collecting data
fewData.text: {{count}} {{word}} — just a bit more, and personal insights and an accurate forecast will appear!

dailyPlan.title: Today's plan
dailyPlan.remaining: {{symbols}} characters left to the daily goal

goals.title: Goals
goals.startStreakDesc: Write something today to begin a streak
goals.streakWeekDesc: Keep your streak going to 7 days in a row
goals.monthDesc: Streak of {{streak}} days. {{left}} to go until 30!
goals.beatRecordDesc: {{left}} left to beat your record of {{record}} characters

forecast.heading: {{project}}: {{title}}
forecast.startWritingMessage: Start writing to see a finish forecast
forecast.collectingMessage: Written {{written}} of {{target}} characters. Keep writing for an accurate forecast!
forecast.aheadMessage: Pace {{speed}} chars/day — finish in {{days}} days, {{ahead}} days before the deadline. You can ease off to {{relaxed}}/day.
forecast.behindMessage: Pace {{speed}} chars/day, finish in {{days}} days (+{{ahead}} past the deadline). Raise it to {{needed}}/day to make it.
forecast.ontrackMessage: Pace {{speed}} chars/day, projected finish in {{days}} days.

week.better: This week is {{percent}}% better than last!
week.worse: This week is {{percent}}% quieter than last
week.same: This week is on par with last

recentTrend.more: Over the last 3 days you're writing {{percent}}% more than average
recentTrend.less: Over the last 3 days you're writing {{percent}}% less than average

breakPattern.boost: You usually write {{days}} days in a row, then take a break. After breaks you come back {{percent}}% stronger!
breakPattern.slower: You usually write {{days}} days in a row. After breaks you ramp up — the first days are {{percent}}% quieter.
breakPattern.normal: You usually write {{days}} days in a row, then take a pause — that's a healthy rhythm!

advice.deadlineOverdueText: The deadline for «{{project}}» is overdue by {{days}} days. It's high time to finish or reconsider the timeline.
advice.deadlineCriticalText: {{days}} days left until the "{{project}}" deadline. Progress: {{progress}}%. You need to write {{needed}} characters/day.
advice.deadlineWarningText: {{days}} days left until the "{{project}}" deadline. Recommended pace: {{needed}} characters/day.
advice.speedSlowText: Your speed is {{speed}} chars/min. Try writing faster without editing right away — draft first, fix later.
advice.speedFastText: Your speed is {{speed}} chars/min — excellent! But don't forget about text quality.
advice.streakRiskText: Your {{streak}}-day streak is at risk! Write at least 100 characters today to keep the series going.
advice.bestTimeText: You write best {{time}}. Try scheduling sessions for this time!
advice.bestDayText: {{day}} is your best day of the week for writing.
advice.startStreakText: Write every day to grow your series. Even 100 characters is progress!
advice.streakGoodStartText: {{streak}} {{word}} in a row! Keep going — momentum matters for writers.
advice.streakOnFireText: {{streak}} days in a row — that's strength! A habit forms in 21 days. {{remaining}} to go!
advice.streakIncredibleText: A {{streak}}-day streak — you're a true pro! Keep it up!
advice.paceSlowText: Average pace: {{avg}} characters/day. Every word brings you closer to the goal!
advice.paceGoodText: {{avg}} characters/day — a great rhythm for long-term work.
advice.paceFastText: {{avg}} characters/day — an impressive pace! Watch out for burnout.
advice.weekEmptyText: No entries in the last 7 days. Start small — 200-300 characters today!
advice.weekQuietText: Not much this week — but the main thing is to start! Try writing 15 minutes every day.
